title: Guarantee creator account has permanent premium access and full admin support access

requirements.text: Update backend admin authorization so the configured creator principal ("fjgwj-bolqk-glt6l-xwnqv-fqp2h-s3apm-4mrnu-ldzti-mctrg-uquqj-sqe") is always treated as an admin-equivalent for all admin-only backend methods (e.g., Stripe configuration, referral code management, adminPremiumDiagnosis, manual premium grant/revoke, and prediction/data management), even if the creator principal is not present in the AccessControl admin set.

quotes: Make sure I always have access to premium membership and admin support

acceptanceCriteria: When the caller principal is exactly the configured creator principal string, admin-only backend methods succeed without trapping for missing #admin permission.
When the caller principal is not an admin and not the creator principal, admin-only backend methods continue to reject with an authorization error.
Premium gating behavior for non-admin/non-creator users is unchanged (still requires an active Stripe subscription, active referral, or manual premium).

requirements.text: Ensure the backend method used by the frontend to determine admin access (actor.isCallerAdmin(), called by frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts) returns true for the configured creator principal so the creator can always open the Admin page (including the Admin Support tab) after login.

quotes: Make sure I always have access to premium membership and admin support

acceptanceCriteria: For the creator principal, actor.isCallerAdmin() returns true.
For a non-admin, non-creator principal, actor.isCallerAdmin() returns false (or continues to error and be treated as false by the frontend), preserving existing access restrictions.
The backend’s reported premium status (checkPremiumStatus) continues to return 'creator' for the creator principal and never returns 'none' for that principal.

requirements.text: Verify and adjust frontend admin gating so that, after the backend changes, the creator principal can reliably access the Admin Dashboard route and use the existing Admin Support UI (including lookups) without seeing an "Access Denied" screen.

quotes: Make sure I always have access to premium membership and admin support

acceptanceCriteria: Logging in as the creator principal allows navigation to the Admin Dashboard and all tabs (including Support) without being blocked by AdminGate.
The Admin Support lookup flow functions normally for creator/admin users (submits a principal ID, shows either a diagnostic report or a clear error message in English).
User-facing text introduced or modified as part of this change is in English.

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor with all logic in backend/main.mo.
Do not edit any frontend files under frontend/src/components/ui or any paths listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Keep existing premium gating semantics for non-admin/non-creator users unchanged.
nonGoals: Adding new authentication methods beyond Internet Identity.
Adding new payment providers or changing subscription pricing/plans.
Building real-time chat, push notifications, or any external database integration.
